# Flatfile Portal Pricing

## Summary
Official Flatfile pricing for their embeddable Portal CSV importer. Flatfile now operates under the brand "Obvious". Offers a genuine free tier (50 files/month, 10M PDV/month) - making it the most accessible managed option for early-stage products.

## Key quotations / statistics
- Free tier: first 50 files/month + 10 million PDV (Processed Data Values) per month - no credit card required
- Starter (pay-as-you-go): $2/file beyond 50, $2.50/million PDV beyond 10M, no monthly minimum
- Professional: $799/month billed annually - adds white labeling, AI Transform, large file support, SSO/SAML
- Enterprise: custom - adds data version history, audit trails, customizable dashboards

## Annotations for weapon-forge
- Flatfile is the only major managed importer with a viable free tier for indie/early-stage products - directly answers Command Brief Q3
- Per-record (PDV) pricing model creates unpredictability at scale - teams should model their expected row volumes before committing
- AI Transform feature on Professional tier may be relevant for teams wanting automatic data transformation on import
- Data passes through Flatfile servers (not client-side) - critical to note for GDPR/HIPAA compliance discussions
